para_trans: With regard to amending the Government Decision on recognition of new courses, subjects, special level subjects, additional batches, new faculties in existing colleges for the academic year 2026-27.
Department of Higher and Technical Education,
Government Refinery No. Shudhdeep-2026 / E- / Mashi-4
Reference: Government Decision No. Approval - 2026 / E-1659792 / MASHI-4, dated 30.06.2026.

As per the government decision, new courses, subjects, special level subjects, additional batches, new faculties have been approved in the existing colleges for the academic year 2026-27. However, the Sakeshwar Rural Development Service Institute, Ahilyanagar, has requested for an amendment to the order.

Accordingly, the University's Recommendation B documents were examined. Accordingly, the University's Recommendation B documents were examined. As per the said inspection, the Government decision dated 30.06.2026 requires amendment in Annexure 3. 2 under Savitribai Phule Pune University, Pune, Government approval is being accorded to Sakeshwar Institute of Rural Development Services, Ahilyanagar to make the amendment mentioned in the following statement.
Government Approval - 2026 / E-1659792 / MASHI-4 Decision No.
table_trans: Description in original Government Decision (Name / Address of the College)
Sakeshwar Rural Development Services Institute, Ahilyanagar runs Adsul Arts, Commerce and Science College, Address: Chas, Ta. Ahilyanagar, Dist. Ahilyanagar
Sakeshwar Rural Development Services Institute, Ahmednagar, run by Adsul Law College, TAT: Chas Ta. Ahilyanagar Dist. Ahilyanagar.
